title: Farmer's Cutting: Twilight Forest
description: Adds Farmer's Delight cutting recipes for Twilight Forest
body:
Adds more [Farmer's Delight](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/farmers-delight) cutting board recipes for [Twilight Forest](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-twilight-forest)

- Bark, stripping, recycling for all wood types
- More dye from flowers that give dye

![Wood Cutting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/DiojkUaV/images/678e6b20992e1efaf0e67e938e350f90fe9c6e89.png) ![Flower Cutting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/DiojkUaV/images/31b7e706d5f81a264a876b153b1a88f1d80fd436.png)
